source_jobs.title: Commercial Insurance Broker, Core
source_jobs.description:
Who We Are

Coverdash is the fastest growing startup and SMB focused-insurtech agency, powered by the industry’s most advanced embedded technology and partnership strategies. Our mission is to help growing businesses purchase and manage business insurance from the places they trust most. Our simple and powerful embedded technology helps partners offer insurance to existing customers with a single line of code.

Coverdash was founded by a team with deep fintech and financial services experience and is the first insurance-as-a-service platform. We have raised over $16 million to date from top investors including NYCA (Affirm, Fundbox, Acorns, Gemini), Bling Capital (Lyft, Square, Instacart, Palantir), World Insurance Labs (HubSpot, DocuSign, Twitter), Expansion VC (Postmates, AngelList, Lemonade).

Headquartered at our brand new state-of-the-art office in the heart of NYC, Coverdash remains a remote friendly working environment. Our rapidly growing team is a smart, dynamic, and fun-loving group privileged to be collaborating with some of the world’s most innovative embedded partners.



The Role

Coverdash is growing our Insurance Core Sales Team and are hiring a Commercial Insurance Broker to focus exclusively on new business sales. In this role, you will work warm inbound leads from embedded partnerships, quote and place coverage for small and medium-sized businesses while building a strong foundation in commercial insurance.

This is a foundational broker role with a clear path to senior producer or Growth team positions as you develop underwriting and placement expertise. No cold calling or servicing required, just high-volume new business in a fast-paced startup environment.



What You’ll Do

 - Own end to end new business sales for commercial P&C insurance, from inbound lead to bind

 - Manage 25-50 warm inbound opportunities daily while meeting activity and revenue targets

 - Advise SMB clients on coverage options and basic risk management practices

 - Quote, market, and place admitted commercial insurance products

 - Partner with carriers to identify and secure appropriate coverage solutions

 - Use Coverdash’s quoting platform and AMS to generate and bind policies

 - Expand expertise in carrier guidelines, underwriting fundamentals, and product offering to increase close rates
   
   

Who You Are

Required

 - 1-3 years of commercial insurance or insurance sales experience

 - Active Commercial Lines P&C license

 - Exposure to one or more commercial insurance products

 - Comfortable handling a high volume of inbound leads

 - Experience with carrier portals, rating platforms and AMS/CRM tools

 - Strong communicator with confidence over phone and email

 - Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple opportunities at once

 - Able to thrive in a fast-paced, startup environment

Nice to Have

 - Prior experience in insurtech or a high growth startup
   
   

Work Environment

 - Remote-first role, work from anywhere in the US

 - NYC office available for in-person collaboration

 - Working hours aligned to your time zone:
   
   - East Coast: 9:00am to 6:00pm ET
   
   - West Coast: 8:00am to 5:00pm PT
     
     

Why Coverdash?

 - Warm inbound leads- no cold outreach

 - Clear growth path into Senior or Growth roles

 - Modern tools built specifically for insurance brokers

 - Fast-paced environment with real ownership and impact

Compensation
Our salary ranges are based on paying competitively for our size and industry and are one part of our total compensation package that also includes benefits and other perks.

Individual pay decisions are based on a number of factors, including qualifications for the role, experience level, skill set, location, and business need. The base pay range provided is subject to change and may be modified in the future.



Coverdash is an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We welcome all qualified applicants regardless of race, color, ancestry, r

source_jobs.title: Commercial Insurance Broker, Growth
source_jobs.description:
Who We Are

Coverdash is the fastest growing startup and SMB focused-insurtech agency, powered by the industry’s most advanced embedded technology and partnership strategies. Our mission is to help growing businesses purchase and manage business insurance from the places they trust most. Our simple and powerful embedded technology helps partners offer insurance to existing customers with a single line of code.

Coverdash was founded by a team with deep fintech and financial services experience and is the first insurance-as-a-service platform. We have raised over $16 million to date from top investors including NYCA (Affirm, Fundbox, Acorns, Gemini), Bling Capital (Lyft, Square, Instacart, Palantir), World Insurance Labs (HubSpot, DocuSign, Twitter), Expansion VC (Postmates, AngelList, Lemonade).

Headquartered at our brand new state-of-the-art office in the heart of NYC, Coverdash remains a remote friendly working environment. Our rapidly growing team is a smart, dynamic, and fun-loving group privileged to be collaborating with some of the world’s most innovative embedded partners.



The Role

As a Commercial Sales Broker at Coverdash, you will support small to medium sized commercial clients by quoting and rating new business opportunities, collaborating with in-house brokers, and building expertise in SMB insurance. You will be primarily responsible for selling and managing admitted and excess & surplus commercial insurance solutions with complex or non standard risks. This role is ideal for someone looking to grow within a modern insurance organization while making a real impact for business owners.



We’re seeking a motivated self-starter who enjoys problem-solving, works well with cross-functional teams, and communicates effectively in a fast-moving startup environment



What You’ll Do

 - Sell Property & Casualty (P&C) commercial insurance to small and mid-sized businesses

 - Quote, rate, and place new business by working with carriers and wholesale partners

 - Manage leads and daily outreach through our CRM to drive pipeline and close opportunities

 - Advise clients on risk exposures and recommend tailored coverage solutions

 - Collaborate with internal brokers and underwriters to secure optimal placements

 - Drive new policy sales and hand off bound accounts to account management for a seamless client experience



Who You Are

Required

 - 3-5 years of commercial insurance experience, with strong exposure to E&S lines

 - Active P&C license in good standing

 - Proven ability to manage high volumes of inbound submissions and warm transfers

 - Hands-on experience rating, quoting, and placing business across multiple E&S and admitted carriers

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills with a consultative, client-first approach

 - Self-starter with a track record of driving results in a fast paced, high growth environment

 - Highly organized with excellent time management skills

 - Comfortable learning and navigating new technology, carrier portals, and underwriting systems

 - Experience using CRM/AMS platforms and comparative rating tools



Nice to Have

 - Experience in insurtech, an MGA, E&S underwriting, or a startup environment



Work Environment

 - Remote-first role, work from anywhere in the US

 - NYC office available for in-person collaboration

 - Working hours aligned to your time zone:
   
   - East Coast: 9:00am to 6:00pm ET
   
   - West Coast: 8:00am to 5:00pm PT



Why Coverdash?

 - Warm inbound leads- no cold outreach

 - Clear growth path into Senior or Enterprise roles

 - Modern tools built specifically for insurance brokers

 - Fast-paced environment with real ownership and impact

Compensation
Our salary ranges are based on paying competitively for our size and industry and are one part of our total compensation package that also includes benefits and other perks.

source_jobs.title: Customer Operations Associate
source_jobs.description:
Who We Are

Coverdash is the fastest growing startup and SMB focused-insurtech agency, powered by the industry’s most advanced embedded technology and partnership strategies. Our mission is to help growing businesses purchase and manage business insurance from the places they trust most. Our simple and powerful embedded technology helps partners offer insurance to existing customers with a single line of code.

Coverdash was founded by a team with deep fintech and financial services experience and is the first insurance-as-a-service platform. We have raised over $16 million to date from top investors including NYCA (Affirm, Fundbox, Acorns, Gemini), Bling Capital (Lyft, Square, Instacart, Palantir), World Insurance Labs (HubSpot, DocuSign, Twitter), Expansion VC (Postmates, AngelList, Lemonade).

Headquartered at our brand new state-of-the-art office in the heart of NYC, Coverdash remains a remote friendly working environment. Our rapidly growing team is a smart, dynamic, and fun-loving group privileged to be collaborating with some of the world’s most innovative embedded partners.



The Role

As a Customer Operations Associate, you play a critical role in ensuring Coverdash clients have a seamless insurance experience behind the scenes. This role exists to keep our client, policy, and billing data accurate, up to date, and compliant, allowing our Service and Sales teams to focus on advising and supporting small businesses.

You'll partner closely with U.S.-based teams, insurance carriers, and internal systems to process policy activity, resolve billing issues, and support day-to-day insurance operations. This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys working with systems, data, and structured processes in a fast-growing insurtech environment, and who is looking for the flexibility of an independent, remote engagement.



What You'll Do

● Maintain accurate client, policy, and billing records within Coverdash's Admin (AMS) system

● Manage and resolve client-related requests through Coverdash's ticketing system

● Process and issue Certificates of Insurance (COIs) efficiently and accurately

● Support policy lifecycle activities including applications, endorsements, renewals, and cancellations

● Coordinate with insurance carriers to retrieve documents, process changes, and complete endorsement quoting

● Ensure daily carrier downloads are completed and all records are kept current

● Support billing operations by handling notices, payment follow-ups, and resolving carrier payment issues

● Collaborate closely with U.S.-based Service and Sales team members to support client needs

● Use Coverdash's platform to support client policy access, payments, and modifications



Who You Are

Required

● 1–3 years of experience in operations, customer support, or administrative roles

● Strong attention to detail with a high level of data accuracy

● Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

● Comfortable working across multiple systems, tools, and online platforms

● Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

● Proactive, reliable, and accountable for your work

● Comfortable working independently and collaborating with international colleagues across time zones



Nice to Have

● Experience with U.S. commercial insurance products or carrier portals

● Familiarity with AMS, ticketing systems, or billing platforms (e.g., Ascend)

● Previous experience supporting U.S.-based teams or clients



Work Environment

● Location: Remote (Serbia-based)

● Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Belgrade time)

● Engagement Type: Full-time, ongoing - you'll manage your own schedule and invoicing as part of this remote engagement



Why Coverdash?

● Be part of a fast-growing insurtech company transforming commercial insurance

● Gain hands-on exposure to U.S. insurance operations and modern insurance technology

● Work with a collaborative, global team that values ownership, transparency, and gro

source_jobs.title: Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
Who We Are

Coverdash is the fastest growing startup and SMB focused-insurtech agency, powered by the industry’s most advanced embedded technology and partnership strategies. Our mission is to help growing businesses purchase and manage business insurance from the places they trust most. Our simple and powerful embedded technology helps partners offer insurance to existing customers with a single line of code.

Coverdash was founded by a team with deep fintech and financial services experience and is the first insurance-as-a-service platform. We have raised over $16 million to date from top investors including NYCA (Affirm, Fundbox, Acorns, Gemini), Bling Capital (Lyft, Square, Instacart, Palantir), World Insurance Labs (HubSpot, DocuSign, Twitter), Expansion VC (Postmates, AngelList, Lemonade).

Headquartered at our brand new state-of-the-art office in the heart of NYC, Coverdash remains a remote friendly working environment. Our rapidly growing team is a smart, dynamic, and fun-loving group privileged to be collaborating with some of the world’s most innovative embedded partners.



The Role

Join Coverdash’s Commercial Risk Unit as a Commercial Insurance Account Manager. In this role, you will build and manage small to mid-sized commercial accounts, quote and rate renewals, support the growth of our in-house brokers and managers, and partner with customer success to manage client needs while developing deep expertise in commercial P&C Insurance.

We are in a rapid growth phase, deploying new software daily, and are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced startup environment. You will work closely with tech teams as the insurance subject matter expert, helping shape processes, systems, and products that modernize how commercial insurance is delivered. This role requires autonomy, adaptability, and a passion for building efficient, customer-focused insurance solutions.



What You’ll Do

 - Manage and retain a portfolio of commercial P&C accounts up to $10MM in annual premium

 - Serve as primary point of contact for client servicing, renewals, and coverage questions

 - Own the renewal process end to end, including proactive renewal conversation prior to quote delivery

 - Clearly explain coverage, pricing, and policy changes

 - Manage client expectations and protect the client experience during underwriting delays, market constraints, or carrier issues

 - Resolve client concerns and escalate internally when needed to ensure timely resolution

 - Execute core policy servicing, including endorsements, certificates of insurance, audits, billing coordination, and cancellations

 - Maintain accurate client records in AMS and CRM

 - Partner with carriers, wholesalers, and internal teams to support renewal and servicing outcomes

 - Adhere to service standards, SLAs, and escalation protocols



Who You Are

Required

 - 3+ years of commercial P&C experience in account management, brokerage, or customer success

 - Active Property & Casualty license in good standing

 - Strong knowledge of commercial P&C coverages, renewals, endorsements, and servicing requirements

 - Proven ability to own the renewal process end to end, including proactive client consultations prior to quoting

 - Confident client-facing presence with experience managing escalations and protecting the client experience during underwriting or carrier challenges

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex insurance concepts in plain language

 - Demonstrated success managing and retaining large or complex books of business

 - Strong organizational, prioritization, and decision making skills in high volume environments

 - Advanced proficiency with CRM and AMS platforms and core business tools

Nice to Have

 - Experience improving workflows, processes, or operational efficiency

 - Prior experience in an insurtech, high-growth, or startup environment



Work Environment

 - Remote-first role, work from anyw
